name: CCleaner — Privacy/Cleanup Tool
categoryDescription: Configuration and artifacts from third-party software — archive tools, cleanup utilities, development tools, and legacy applications.
description: CCleaner configuration including cleaning settings, scheduled runs, and history.
forensic_value: CCleaner is commonly used by attackers to wipe browser history, temp files, and other artifacts. Run timestamps confirm anti-forensic cleanup events. Options reveal which artifact categories were cleaned.
